Planned Work Order expected receipts\nfor(i\x3D0; i\x3CplanQty.length; i++) {\n\tresult.push([planDueDate[i], \x27PL\x27, planRef[i], whsePl[i], planQty[i], \x27-\x27]);\n}\n//sort array by date\nresult.sort(function(a, b) {\n\tvar dateA \x3D new Date(a[0]), dateB \x3D new Date(b[0]);\n\treturn dateA-dateB;\n})\n\n//Create running balance\nif(Number(qtyRii) \x3E 0) {\n     result.unshift([,,\x27Rec / Insp\x27,, Number(qtyRii),\x27-\x27,]); //put receiving/inspection qty on top of array\n}\nresult.unshift([,,\x27Current Balance\x27,,,, Number(qtyOnHand)]); //put current balance on top of array\nfor(i\x3D1; i\x3Cresult.length; i++) {\n\t//curr row balance \x3D prev row balance + curr row receipts - current row demands\n\tvar qtyIn \x3D result[i][4]\n\tif(qtyIn
